channel.title: Altera — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Altera (altera).

item.title: CVE-2025-14625 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus® Prime Standard and Quartus® Prime Lite Security Advisory
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Standard on Windows (Nios II Command Shell modules), Altera Quartus Prime Lite on Windows (Nios II Command Shell modules) allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Quartus…

item.title: CVE-2025-14614 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus® Prime Standard and Quartus® Prime Lite Security Advisory
item.description: Insecure Temporary File vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Standard Installer (SFX) on Windows, Altera Quartus Prime Lite Installer (SFX) on Windows allows Explore for Predictable Temporary File Names.This issue affects Quartus Prime Standard: fro…

item.title: CVE-2025-14599 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus® Prime Standard and Quartus® Prime Lite Security Advisory
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Standard Installer (SFX) on Windows, Altera Quartus Prime Lite Installer (SFX) on Windows allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Quartus Prime Standard: from 23.1 throug…

item.title: CVE-2025-14612 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Pro Edition Advisory
item.description: Insecure Temporary File vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Pro Installer (SFX) on Windows allows : Use of Predictable File Names.This issue affects Quartus Prime Pro: from 24.1 through 25.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-14605 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Pro Edition Advisory
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Pro on Windows (System Console modules) allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Quartus Prime Pro: from 17.0 through 25.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-14596 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Pro Edition Installer Advisory
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Altera Quartus Prime Pro Installer (SFX) on Windows allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects Quartus Prime Pro: from 24.1 through 24.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-13670 · 6.7 MEDIUM — High Level Synthesis Compiler Security Advisory
item.description: The High Level Synthesis Compiler i++ command for Windows is vulnerable to a DLL planting vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-13669 · 6.7 MEDIUM — High Level Synthesis Compiler Security Advisory
item.description: Uncontrolled Search Path Element vulnerability in Altera High Level Synthesis Compiler on Windows allows Search Order Hijacking.This issue affects High Level Synthesis Compiler: from 19.1 through 24.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-13665 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Standard Security Advisory
item.description: The System Console Utility for Windows is vulnerable to a DLL planting vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2025-13668 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Pro Edition Advisory
item.description: A potential security vulnerability in Quartus® Prime Pro Edition Design Software may allow escalation of privilege.

item.title: CVE-2025-13664 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Standard Security Advisory
item.description: A potential security vulnerability in Quartus® Prime Standard Edition Design Software may allow escalation of privilege.

item.title: CVE-2025-13663 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Quartus Prime Pro Edition Installer Advisory
item.description: Under certain circumstances, the Quartus Prime Pro Installer for Windows does not check the permissions of the Quartus target installation directory if the target installation directory already exists.
